history.content:
<thought>
The cell directly in front of me is lava, so moving forward is unsafe. The goal is visible to my right and above, so I should rotate clockwise to face a safer direction toward the open path.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am facing upward. The cell in front of me is safe floor, while the goal is visible to my upper-left. Moving forward keeps me on a safe path and may bring me closer to the goal without stepping on lava.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
Iâ€™m facing upward again. The goal is visible to my left, but the cell directly ahead is safe floor and the left route is blocked by lava nearby, so advancing is the safest immediate move.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
The goal is immediately to my left, while the cell in front is a wall. I cannot move forward, so I should rotate counter-clockwise to face the goal and then advance on the next step.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am facing toward the top of the view, and the cell directly ahead is a lava cell, so moving forward is unsafe. The goal is visible one cell to my left, and that left cell is floor, so I should turn counter-clockwise to face it.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
The goal O is directly to my right, and the cell to my right is the goal path, so I should move forward toward it. The cell ahead is not lava and appears safe.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I no longer see the goal directly, but the cell in front of me is safe and open. Moving forward keeps me exploring toward the previously seen goal while avoiding the lava that is to my right in the upper row.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
The lava is now directly in front of me if I keep facing the same way, so moving forward would be fatal. I should turn left to face a safer direction and continue exploring around the obstacle.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am facing a wall directly ahead, so moving forward is blocked. The open cell is to my left, so I should turn counter-clockwise to face it and proceed around the obstacle.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
The goal O is visible nearby, but there is lava L directly in the path if I go left from my current orientation. The safest immediate move is to avoid stepping into lava and move toward the open floor cell ahead/right by turning clockwise.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am facing upward. The cell directly in front of me is a wall, so I cannot move forward. I need to turn to face a free cell; the open space is to my left, so a counter-clockwise turn is the best next step.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
The goal O is visible one row ahead and two cells to the left, but there is lava L directly between me and the goal on that row. The cell in front of me is also a wall, so I cannot advance. To navigate around the obstacle, I should turn counter-clockwise to face the open path on my left.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
The goal O is visible ahead and to the right, but the cell directly in front of me is lava, so I must not move forward. To make progress safely, I should rotate clockwise to face a safer direction toward the open floor.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
Iâ€™m facing a wall directly ahead, so moving forward is impossible. The goal O is visible to my left, but there is lava near that side as well. I will rotate counter-clockwise to reorient toward the open path and avoid the wall in front of me.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
The cell directly in front of me is lava, so I must not move forward. The safe open cell is to my right, and turning clockwise will orient me toward that path while avoiding the lava.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>
